name: a committed Azure multi-region posture adds a grounded multi_region reliability concern
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile v11.json --out req.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("req.json")); mr=p["pillars"].values.flatten.find{|x|x["concern"]=="multi_region"}; exit(mr && mr["source_id"]=="azure-well-architected" && mr["grounding"]=="grounded" ? 0:1)' && echo azure-multiregion-grounded 1>&2
setup: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "API on Azure with AKS" --answers p.json --probe-answer azure:azure_region_strategy=multi-region --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
